Component intelligence for hardware OEMs · San Francisco

Never be blindsided by a component shortage, EOL, or tariff change again.

Prokuro monitors every component in your BOM, flagging EOL risk, tariff exposure, and supplier concentration before they stop your line. Built by engineers who shipped these systems at Cisco.

Built by engineers who tracked AI repair accuracy across tens of thousands of units at Flex, Foxconn, and Fabrinet. Now available to every hardware team.

The problems that shut lines down

You found out too late

The average OEM learns about a component EOL 6 months before it hits. Qualifying an alternate takes 12-18 months. That gap costs millions.

Your BOM is a geopolitical risk map

35-60% of hardware BOMs have components sourced from regions with active tariff or export control exposure. Most teams do not know which ones.

Your CM will tell you last

Contract manufacturers manage hundreds of clients. Allocation issues, lead-time blowouts, and quality escapes reach you last. Prokuro puts you first.

How it works

1

Upload your BOM

CSV or Excel. We extract every MPN, manufacturer, and quantity in about 60 seconds.

2

We enrich every line item

Octopart live data, HTS tariff codes, US Entity List checks, EOL databases, and LLM-powered geopolitical risk analysis run on every component.

3

Get your risk report

You get a prioritized queue of risky components, why each one is risky, and what to do next. Delivered as PDF now, dashboard monitoring after onboarding.

Key features

EOL Early Warning

We flag components approaching end-of-life 12-18 months out so you can qualify alternates before redesign work becomes an emergency.

Tariff and Trade Exposure

Every component is mapped to HTS code and monitored for tariff-rate changes, Section 301 exposure, and Entity List restrictions the day they change.

Supplier Concentration Risk

Single-source dependencies, China concentration, and TSMC-dependent nodes are scored before they become leverage someone else holds over your ship dates.

Alternate Component Engine

When a risk is flagged, we suggest pin-compatible alternates with live Octopart availability and lead-time data. Not just a warning. A path forward.

Who it's for

Best fit

  • Hardware OEMs with $50M-$500M annual revenue
  • Products with 3-10 year lifespans (networking, industrial, medical-adjacent)
  • Teams outsourcing manufacturing to Flex, Foxconn, Fabrinet, Jabil, or similar CMs
  • Companies burned in the 2021-2022 shortage and still carrying that scar tissue
  • Procurement and engineering teams still running BOM risk in spreadsheets

Not a fit if...

  • You ship consumer hardware on 12-month refresh cycles
  • You already run a large in-house supply-chain data-science team
  • You are pre-product and do not have a real BOM yet

"One missed EOL on a 7-year product means 18 months of emergency redesign. One tariff change can blow up your COGS by 8-15%. Prokuro costs less than either mistake."

We built this system internally at Cisco, tracking component performance across tens of thousands of production units at the world's largest contract manufacturers. Now we're making it available to every hardware team.

What you get in every report

14 components flagged · 3 HIGH risk · 8 MEDIUM · 3 LOW

Continuous Monitoring

Starts at $9,000 / month
